changeSet.author: mercotrace
mercotrace

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT seller_vehicle_id, LOWER(BTRIM(lot_name)) AS normalized_lot_name, COUNT(*) AS c FROM lot GROUP BY seller_vehicle_id, LOWER(BTRIM(lot_name)) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) dups

changeSet.comment: Pre-check for duplicate lot names within seller before adding unique index.

changeSet.author: mercotrace
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS uq_lot_seller_lot_name_norm ON lot (seller_vehicle_id, LOWER(BTRIM(lot_name)));
